title: Cloud Guard Instance Security: Pack Coverage
description: Counts Cloud Guard Instance Security and OSQuery result events by pack, severity, and status.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs' | stats count as Findings, unique('Host Name') as Hosts by 'Pack Name', 'Finding Severity', 'Finding Status' | sort -Findings

candidates: SOC Cloud Guard Instance Security Logs
